title: Canonical assumption ledger
description: Machine-readable register of every milestone-shaping assumption whose invalidation would reopen product scope, re-baseline a milestone, or force a public-claim narrowing. Rows carry a stable AL-NNNN id, a single-sentence statement, one owner DRI, one owning decision forum, one validation deadline, one named validation checkpoint, one required-proof description, one earliest-impacted milestone, one default response if the assumption is falsified, a widening posture stating whether the assumption blocks scope widening or only narrows downstream claims, and append-only history. Assumption rows resolve against the launch decision register (LR-NNNN) and the rolling decision index (D-NNNN) for closure, against the dependency ledger for blocker propagation, against the milestone scorecard for lane posture, and against the risk register for material risk framing; every row MUST link at least one of those consumers. Aging, falsification, and closure are explicit outcomes - rows never disappear into meeting notes.

schema_version.description: Document schema version. Increment on breaking field changes; additive-minor changes (new optional property, new enum value, new sub-record) do not bump this constant.

source_specs.description: Repository-relative paths to the source-of-truth specs whose milestone-shaping assumptions this register projects.

status_class.description: Assumption lifecycle state. open: recognised, not yet proven or disproven. validated: proof recorded and accepted. invalidated: falsification recorded; default_response_if_false fires. deferred: checkpoint moved to a later milestone with a restated deadline. superseded: replaced by a later AL-NNNN row. closed_not_applicable: the premise no longer shapes any active milestone row.

widening_posture.description: blocks_widening: while the assumption is open, no launch or milestone claim may widen past the assumption-bounded scope without a re-baseline record. narrows_claims_only: the assumption bounds current claim wording but does not block lane work or widening on unrelated claims.

checkpoint_class.description: Named forum or evidence-refresh class that owns validating or invalidating the assumption. Validation checkpoints live in these cadences, not in meeting notes.

proof_class.description: Kind of proof that discharges the assumption. The row MUST state a concrete instance in required_proof.description; this enum routes downstream tooling.

default_response_class.description: Shape of the response that fires if the assumption is invalidated before validation_deadline. narrow_scope: reduce committed scope per default_response_if_false.description. defer_milestone: move the closure target out by an explicit milestone. freeze_lane: block dependent work on the affected lane until a replacement assumption lands. rebaseline_milestone: trigger a milestone rebaseline review. descope_feature: cut a named feature below the commitment class floor. open_exception_packet: route to a freeze-exception packet. cut_public_claim: retract the dependent public claim from the claim manifest.

description.description: Concrete statement of what must exist to discharge the assumption. A freshness scan must be able to read this sentence verbatim and route it to the named evidence owner.

evidence_refs.description: Repository-relative paths or ids of evidence supporting the assumption as it stands today. Empty while the row is still open.

description.description: Concrete narrowing / deferral / freeze / rebaseline / descope / cut statement that fires if the assumption is invalidated. A freeze report must be able to print this sentence as the explicit outcome.

requires_approval_from.description: Forum ids whose approval is needed before the default response fires. Empty means the response fires automatically on invalidation.

assumption_id.description: Stable assumption-ledger id. Not reusable when a row is superseded; mint a new id and point superseded_by at it.

statement.description: One-sentence premise statement. Reads as a falsifiable claim, not as a rationale.

target_milestone.description: Milestone slug the assumption primarily shapes.

earliest_milestone_impact.description: Milestone slug of the earliest milestone that takes the hit if the assumption is falsified. May equal target_milestone.

backup_waiver.description: Waiver id from artifacts/governance/ownership_matrix.yaml#waivers. Required when backup_owner is null.

validation_deadline.description: Date by which the row MUST be validated, invalidated, deferred, superseded, or closed_not_applicable. A row still open past this date is a validation failure.

description.description: Concrete checkpoint naming where and how the assumption is re-examined on cadence. Must name a real forum or evidence-refresh surface rather than 'TBD'.

linked_launch_register_rows.description: Launch-register decision ids this assumption underwrites.

linked_decision_index_rows.description: Rolling-index decision ids this assumption underwrites.

linked_dependency_ledger_rows.description: Dependency ledger ids whose premise includes this assumption. Values MUST match rows in artifacts/governance/dependency_ledger.yaml#dependency_rows[*].dependency_id.

linked_scorecard_lanes.description: Scorecard lane ids drawn from artifacts/governance/ownership_matrix.yaml#scorecard_lane_index. Scorecards cite this assumption_id against the named lane rather than inventing a parallel status field.

linked_risk_register_rows.description: Risk ids from artifacts/milestones/M0_risk_register.yaml whose material framing rests on this assumption.

affected_artifacts.description: Repo-relative paths or lane ids whose contracts, claims, or posture are bounded by this assumption. Non-empty.

source_anchors.description: Pointers into source documents that motivate this assumption.

superseded_by.description: Assumption-ledger ids that supersede this row. Non-empty only when status is superseded.

history.description: Append-only history. Never rewrite; add new entries. Every row MUST carry at least one opened entry.

allOf.description: backup_waiver MUST be set when backup_owner is null.
superseded_by MUST be non-empty when status is superseded.
validated_on MUST be set when status is validated.
invalidated_on MUST be set when status is invalidated.

Every row MUST link at least one downstream consumer (launch register, rolling decision index, dependency ledger, scorecard lane, or risk-register row) so the assumption's footprint is queryable rather than implicit.
